industry: JavaScript package management and software supply chain tooling

prompts.prompt: What is the best package manager for JavaScript projects?
prompts.why: Tests whether npm appears when users ask broad package-management questions.

prompts.prompt: How do teams securely publish JavaScript packages?
prompts.why: Tests whether npm documentation is cited for publishing, access tokens, and account protection.

prompts.prompt: What tools help manage dependencies in Node.js projects?
prompts.why: Tests visibility for practical dependency-management workflows.

prompts.prompt: How should developers audit open source package vulnerabilities?
prompts.why: Tests whether npm audit and security documentation are surfaced.

prompts.prompt: How can a company manage private JavaScript packages?
prompts.why: Tests whether npm organizations, access control, and private packages are mentioned.
